Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents an order placed by a customer

clientName.description: Name of the customer placing the order

deliveryType.description: Type of delivery (pickup or home delivery)

address.description: Optional street address for home deliveries

phone.description: Contact phone number for the order

items.description: List of dishes and snacks ordered

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated

Config.title: Config
Config.description: Global settings for menu prices, inventory levels, promotions, and consecutives

prices.description: Map of product IDs to override prices

activeStatus.description: Map of product IDs to availability status

forceMartesAlitas.description: Control flag for Tuesday Wings promo

inventory.description: Map of key ingredients to current stock count
